def positive_type_alias_shadows_builtin_name():
    rule_id = "type_alias_shadows_builtin_name"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Type alias variable assigned a name that shadows a Python builtin such as list, dict, or type."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
